newTests.name: should fall back to summary.remoteHref when remote-href option is missing
should not append pluginId when there is only one summary
should prefer remote-href option over summary.remoteHref
should append pluginId to remote-href when there are multiple summaries with pluginId
should normalize trailing slash when appending pluginId to remote-href
should not render View link when neither remote-href option nor summary.remoteHref is set
should render View link from remote-href option for every row
